Metadata.SimplifiedName: You Have to Win the Game (Kabuto - 2012)
Metadata.SourceFile: You Have to Win the Game (Commodore Format Power Pack 63).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0814 "YOUHAVETOWINTHEGAME-0814" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "You Have to Win the Game (Kabuto - 2012).prg"
